title: GSSSB – Laboratory Technician – 10 Posts

basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Laboratory Technician Class-3 Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) Recruitment 2026 for 10 posts of Laboratory Technician Class-3. Candidates with B.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 15-05-2026, and closes on 24-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through GSSSB official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Chemistry / Microbiology / Biochemistry, Diploma in Laboratory Technician or Medical Laboratory Technician course or Post-graduate diploma in medical laboratory technology or one year Medical Laboratory Technician training course, Basic knowledge of computer application as per Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment Rules 1967, Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
